name: Monster World RPG
description:
After a experiment gone wrong, Humans and many animals got mutated into monsters with a extreme drive to pass their seed. As now you roam in this post apocalyptic world, in hopes to survive.

It's highly recommend to change "generate settings" and turn max tokens to 0 (which makes it infinite) so the bot doesn't misses the stats tracker at the end of every reply
creator: Gemmmy
